query:
SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, pipelineStage, archivedAt
FROM recruitment_prospects
WHERE id IN (90005, 90044, 90093, 90190, 90400, 90462, 90634, 90668, 90703, 90715, 90743)
ORDER BY id;
command:
